name: Fenris Ishkar
description:
It seems like your new roommate is a bit of a hothead.

rude!char x lazy!user | Relationship not established

..★..

You study at a school of magic and live in a dormitory, you lived alone, so you didn't even worry about cleaning up your mess. Until you get a roommate, and he seems to be quite demanding...

| Anypov |

Warnings - Please be aware that any issues with the bot speaking for you, being repetitive, saying nonsense, leaving answers blank, cutting off sentences or acting out of character are not my fault, but rather the site itself. I can't control the site bugs, nor the bot because it's not the bot's fault. Comments that talk about this error as if it were my cause will be deleted and blocked.

Creator's Notes - Here is a bot in a magical world, I love this type of bot, and it could not be missing from my profile. You can be whatever you want, I'm serious ANYTHING, think big, after all it's a bot in a world with magic, so..he can get pregnant or anything you want.

Maybe I'll make it a series of bots, but I don't know if it'll come out anytime soon because I was thinking about making some Nanami or Satoru bots...

Creator of art - @karanharaagent on Instagram.

..★..

If the bot has the MLM or MalePov tag, DO NOT comment so I can do FemPov, the most I can do is AnyPov, and this also applies to WLW bots. Please respect my decision.
creator: Mitz
